Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf] 141 upvotes, 20 comments
  2. The gold standard of optimization: A look under the hood of RollerCoaster Tycoon 557 upvotes, 153 comments
  3. An incoherent Rust 52 upvotes, 9 comments
  4. Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²) 97 upvotes, 23 comments
  5. The Minimalist Entrepreneur – Claude Code Skills 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor 88 upvotes, 22 comments
  7. Autoresearch on an old research idea 169 upvotes, 49 comments
  8. Flipper Zero, Everyone's Favorite Legally Dubious Hacker Tool, Gets AI Upgrade 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  9. Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application 34 upvotes, 8 comments
  10. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 119 upvotes, 43 comments
  11. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs 204 upvotes, 82 comments
  12. GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability 407 upvotes, 208 comments
  13. “Collaboration” is bullshit 240 upvotes, 124 comments
  14. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 381 upvotes, 208 comments
  15. Local Stack Archived their GitHub repo and requires an account to run 91 upvotes, 41 comments
  16. The Treasury just declared the U.S. insolvent 17 upvotes, 4 comments
  17. Walmart: ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than website 369 upvotes, 240 comments
  18. How I'm Productive with Claude Code 24 upvotes, 9 comments
  19. Digs: Offline-first iOS app to browse your Discogs vinyl collection 31 upvotes, 14 comments
  20. US and TotalEnergies reach 'nearly $1B' deal to end offshore wind projects 240 upvotes, 171 comments
  21. Migrating to the EU 775 upvotes, 610 comments
  22. Bets on US-Iran ceasefire show signs of insider knowledge, say experts 48 upvotes, 27 comments
  23. Show HN: Threadprocs – executables sharing one address space (0-copy pointers) 58 upvotes, 36 comments
  24. American Aviation Is Near Collapse 77 upvotes, 55 comments
  25. AI Risks "Hypernormal" Science 32 upvotes, 19 comments
  26. Is it a pint? 155 upvotes, 129 comments
  27. Cyber.mil serving file downloads using TLS certificate which expired 3 days ago 146 upvotes, 143 comments
  28. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 164 upvotes, 183 comments
  29. General Motors is assisting with the restoration of a rare EV1 79 upvotes, 94 comments
  30. Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia 248 upvotes, 404 comments

Last generated 5:30am, 24 March 2026. Source here.
